name: Butternut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar together thoroughly.
2. Stir in flour and salt; then nuts; mix well.
3. Form the stiff dough into egg-shaped pieces, about 1-1/2 inches long.
4. Bake in a 350-degree oven for about 15 minutes.
5. Cool on a rack.
6. Spread half of the cookies with powdered sugar glaze or melted chocolate.
7. Sprinkle with coconut, chopped nuts, colored sugar, or decorations.
8. Let sit until the glaze is dry.
Makes 5-6 dozen cookies.
Powdered Sugar Glaze: Combine 1 cup (packed) Confectioners' Powdered Sugar with 1-1/2 tablespoons water. Stir until smooth.
